hero.title: Buy Absolutely Nothing
hero.subtitle: The revolutionary e-commerce platform selling what you never knew you needed.
hero.description: This is not a scam. This is performance art. This is social commentary. This is your chance to own a piece of conceptual absurdity. 100% transparent. 100% nothing.

premium.name: Premium Nothing
premium.description: Our flagship product. Absolutely nothing, but make it premium.

deluxe.name: Deluxe Nothing
deluxe.description: Nothing, but fancier. For the discerning consumer.

ultimate.name: Ultimate Nothing
ultimate.description: The apex of nothingness. Pure absence in its final form.

starter.name: Starter Nothing
starter.description: Perfect for nothing beginners. Dip your toes into the void.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.empty: Your cart is as empty as your purchase
cart.emptySubtext: Add some nothing to get started

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.disclaimer: By proceeding, you acknowledge that you are literally purchasing NOTHING. No physical or digital product will be delivered except a certificate and photo documentation. This is performance art / social experiment. All sales are final because... well, there's nothing to return.

certificate.downloadHint: Download your official proof of purchase. Includes [ NOTHING CAPTURED ].
certificate.printedHint: Your certificate is ready. Print it on transparent paper for authenticity.

footer.tagline: The Nothing Store - A bold experiment in absurdist capitalism
footer.legal: All purchases are non-refundable (obviously). You are literally buying nothing. This is 100% transparent. Proceeds will fund the creator's next big idea. Thank you for being part of something beautifully meaningless.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Nothing Store. All rights (to nothing) reserved.

photos.qualityControl: Quality control inspection of your Nothing
photos.facility: Your Nothing in our state-of-the-art facility
photos.shipping: Final preparations before shipping your Nothing
